# 🧠 Models (13)

The crown jewels: open weights you can download, run, and build on today. Browse the frontier of LLMs, vision, audio, and multimodal systems that rival the closed labs.

[↑ Back to index](../README.md)

## LLM Weights

Open large language models you can grab, run, and fine-tune without an API bill

- [AI4Finance-Foundation/FinGPT](https://github.com/AI4Finance-Foundation/FinGPT) — ⭐ 20,018 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Model Weights — FinGPT provides open-source financial Large Language Models (LLMs), with trained model weights released on HuggingFace, aiming to revolutionize financial applications.
- [OpenBMB/MiniCPM](https://github.com/OpenBMB/MiniCPM) — ⭐ 8,947 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Model Weights — This repository hosts MiniCPM5-1B, a state-of-the-art 1 billion parameter large language model designed for efficient on-device execution. It achieves top performance among small models, outperforming larger counterparts across various benchmarks including knowledge, mathematics, and coding.
- [Tencent-Hunyuan/Hy3-preview](https://github.com/Tencent-Hunyuan/Hy3-preview) — ⭐ 310 · `Python` · Model Weights — Hy3 preview is a Tencent large language model (MoE) focused on advanced reasoning, coding, and agent capabilities, demonstrating frontier-level performance in STEM and competitive mathematics.
- [AEON-7/Qwen3.6-27B-AEON-Ultimate-Uncensored-DFlash](https://github.com/AEON-7/Qwen3.6-27B-AEON-Ultimate-Uncensored-DFlash) — ⭐ 135 · `Python` · Model Weights — This repository offers a deployment guide and resources for an optimized, uncensored Qwen3.6-27B language model. It utilizes NVFP4 hardware quantization to enable efficient and fast token decoding on high-end NVIDIA GPUs.
- [huggingface/nanowhale](https://github.com/huggingface/nanowhale) — ⭐ 113 · `Python` · Model Weights — HuggingFace's Nanowhale is a small 110M parameter language model built with the DeepSeek-V4 architecture. It's designed for experimenting with advanced features like MLA, MoE, Hyper-Connections, and multi-token prediction, and includes pre-training steps.
- [BlinkDL/Albatross](https://github.com/BlinkDL/Albatross) — ⭐ 110 · `Cuda` · Model Weights — Albatross refers to an implementation related to the RWKV-7 G1g LLM, notable for its high-performance decoding capabilities.
- [huggingface/transformers-to-mlx](https://github.com/huggingface/transformers-to-mlx) — ⭐ 24 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — This repository provides an agent skill designed to convert large language models (LLMs) from the Hugging Face Transformers format to Apple's MLX framework. It enables optimized model execution on Apple Silicon.

## Specialized Models

Domain experts for code, biology, math, and other narrow but mighty tasks

- [PriorLabs/TabPFN](https://github.com/PriorLabs/TabPFN) — ⭐ 6,497 · `Python` · Model Weights — TabPFN is a foundation model optimized for tabular data, proficient in classification and regression tasks on small datasets. It aims to simplify machine learning by minimizing feature engineering and parameter tuning requirements.
- [PINTO0309/PINTO\_model\_zoo](https://github.com/PINTO0309/PINTO_model_zoo) — ⭐ 4,386 · `Python` · Model Weights — A repository for storing models that have been inter-converted between various frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, and ONNX. It offers a comprehensive collection of pre-trained models, including those for detection, pose estimation, and instance segmentation, for different deployment needs.
- [cactus-compute/needle](https://github.com/cactus-compute/needle) — ⭐ 1,888 · `Python` · Library — Needle is a small, efficient 26-million parameter AI model for function calling, distilled from Gemini's capabilities. It's designed to run locally on low-power devices like edge devices, browsers, or embedded systems without needing a GPU, making it suitable for secondary development in constrained environments.
- [Nicolepcx/transformers-the-definitive-guide](https://github.com/Nicolepcx/transformers-the-definitive-guide) — ⭐ 97 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Tutorial/Course — This repository serves as the official companion code for the book "Transformers - The Definitive Guide". It provides practical implementations and examples of transformer models for diverse AI applications, including vision, audio analysis, large language models, and reinforcement learning agents.
- [microsoft/GridSFM](https://github.com/microsoft/GridSFM) — ⭐ 26 · `Python` · Model Weights — This repository contains small foundation models specifically developed by Microsoft for analysis and applications within the power grid domain.

## Other

Niche checkpoints, merges, and experimental weights worth a download

- [Liquid4All/cookbook](https://github.com/Liquid4All/cookbook) — ⭐ 1,913 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Tutorial/Course — This cookbook provides examples, end-to-end tutorials, and applications built using Liquid AI Foundational Models (LFM) and the LEAP SDK.
